_comments.vocabulary_principles: 1. Balanced grouping (A/B/C) with an even distribution of parts of speech across lessons. 2. Includes parts of speech, English and Chinese definitions. 3. Example sentences and translations fully adopt original textbook text. 4. Core words are kept in main lists, while their word family derivatives are explicitly placed inside the 'derivatives' array under each wordDetail for systematic student review.
_comments.story_principles: 1. Difficulty categorized by CEFR levels (A2, B1, B2, C1), with Bonus at C2 level. 2. Diverse text types (emails, news, commentary, etc.). 3. Provides ample contextual clues (collocations, hints). 4. Bonus covers all unit vocabulary with a professional tone.
_comments.format_standards: 1. Target vocabulary is marked using **word**. 2. Objects are minified into single lines to optimize line count. 3. Strict structural consistency across vocabulary > Lesson > Group > words/stories.

GroupA.title: 學生日記
GroupA.story: I have a new science **project**. I need to **organize** my desk first. Every small **detail** is important. If I finish, my mom will give me a **reward**. This is my main **mission** today. I cannot go to any **social** events. It is a **struggle**, but I will try my best.
GroupA.translation: 我有一個新的科學**專題研究**。我需要先**安排**整理我的書桌。每一個小**細節**都很重要。如果我完成了，我媽媽會給我一個**獎賞**。這是我今天主要的**任務**。我不能去任何**社交**活動。這是一場**奮鬥**，但我會盡力而為。

GroupA.title: 活動籌備郵件
GroupA.story: We are planning a big **social** event for the school. This **project** requires a lot of teamwork. We must **organize** the food and music by Friday. Our **mission** is to make everyone happy. Do not **struggle** with the decorations; we will help you. Please check every **detail** on the list. Seeing everyone smile will be our best **reward**.
GroupA.translation: 我們正在為學校策劃一場大型的**社交**活動。這個**專題計畫**需要大量的團隊合作。我們必須在星期五之前**安排**好食物和音樂。我們的**使命**是讓每個人都開心。請不要為了裝飾而**苦苦掙扎**；我們會幫你。請檢查清單上的每一個**細節**。看到大家微笑將會是我們最好的**回報**。

GroupA.title: 社區新聞報導
GroupA.story: The local charity's primary **mission** is to help homeless people. Many families **struggle** to find food during winter. This creates a serious **social** problem in the city. To help them, volunteers started a new **project**. They **organize** weekly food drives and pay attention to every **detail**. Their hard work brings a safer community, which is a great **reward**.
GroupA.translation: 當地慈善機構的首要**任務**是幫助無家可歸的人。許多家庭在冬天為了尋找食物而**苦苦掙扎**。這在城市中造成了嚴重的**社會**問題。為了幫助他們，志工們發起了一項新**專案**。他們每週**安排**食物募捐活動，並關注每一個**細節**。他們辛勤的工作帶來了一個更安全的社區，這是一份很棒的**回報**。

GroupA.title: 社會學評論
GroupA.story: The working class continues to **struggle** against economic inequality. This book explores these complex **social** dynamics. Communities must **organize** themselves to survive crises. The author's research **project** analyzes this phenomenon deeply. Every theoretical **detail** is supported by extensive data. Ultimately, the book views civic duty as a mandatory **mission**, where societal stability serves as the greatest collective **reward**.
GroupA.translation: 勞工階級持續對抗經濟不平等而**奮鬥**。這本書探討了這些複雜的**社會**動態。社區必須自行**組織安排**以度過危機。作者的研究**專題**深入分析了這個現象。每一個理論**細節**都有廣泛的數據支持。最終，這本書將公民責任視為一項義務性的**使命**，而社會穩定則是最大的集體**回報**。

GroupA.title: 專業社論
GroupA.story: No subtle **detail** can be overlooked when reforming public infrastructure. The government must meticulously **organize** the administrative framework to achieve its transformative **mission**. Creating profound **social** dividends requires unwavering commitment to this monumental **project**. The unparalleled **reward** for future generations will justify the immense systemic **struggle** we face today.
GroupA.translation: 在改革公共基礎設施時，任何微小的**細節**都不容忽視。政府必須一絲不苟地**組織安排**行政框架，以實現其具變革性的**使命**。創造深遠的**社會**紅利需要對這項具紀念意義的**專案計畫**有著堅定不移的承諾。為後代子孫帶來的無與倫比的**回報**，將證明我們今日面臨的巨大體制**奮鬥**是值得的。

GroupB.title: 校園對話
GroupB.story: My teacher will **guide** me to use the library. I have a new reading **task** today. I need to **memorize** five English words. Learning new words is a fun **activity**. I hope to **discover** interesting books on the shelf. The school bell rings in a daily **cycle**. Reading will **enable** me to get good grades.
GroupB.translation: 我的老師將會**指引**我使用圖書館。我今天有一個新的閱讀**任務**。我需要**熟記**五個英文單字。學習新單字是一項有趣的**活動**。我希望能**發現**書架上有趣的書。學校的鐘聲以每天的**週期**響起。閱讀將**使**我**能夠**取得好成績。

GroupB.title: 工作進度報告
GroupB.story: Our main **task** is to plan the outdoor team-building **activity**. We must **memorize** the names of all our clients before they arrive. The new software will **enable** us to work faster. This document will **guide** our team through the next steps. If we work together, we can **discover** more efficient ways to sell our products and shorten our sales **cycle**.
GroupB.translation: 我們主要的**工作任務**是策劃戶外團隊建設**活動**。在所有客戶抵達之前，我們必須**熟記**他們的名字。新軟體將**使**我們**能夠**工作得更快。這份文件將會**指引**我們團隊進行接下來的步驟。如果我們齊心協力，我們就能**發現**更有效率的產品銷售方式，並縮短我們的銷售**週期**。

GroupB.title: 科普短文
GroupB.story: A recent ocean observation helped scientists **discover** a new pattern in water temperatures. This breakthrough will **enable** researchers to predict storms more accurately. Tracking the Earth's weather **cycle** is a highly complex **task**. They rely on advanced satellites to **guide** their research. Fortunately, computers handle the data for this scientific **activity**, so they do not have to **memorize** the numbers.
GroupB.translation: 最近一項海洋觀測幫助科學家**發現**了水溫的新模式。這項突破將**使**研究人員**能夠**更準確地預測風暴。追蹤地球的天氣**循環**是一項高度複雜的**任務**。他們仰賴先進的衛星來**指引**他們的研究。幸運的是，電腦會處理這項科學**活動**的數據，所以他們不必**死記硬背**那些數字。

GroupB.title: 商業趨勢分析
GroupB.story: Analyzing the global economic **cycle** helps corporations **discover** underlying consumer trends. The comprehensive study aims to **guide** corporate leaders through market uncertainties. These innovative methodologies **enable** multinational firms to optimize their business **activity**. Consequently, the primary executive **task** is no longer just requiring employees to **memorize** outdated behavioral patterns.
GroupB.translation: 分析全球經濟**週期**有助於企業**發現**潛在的消費者趨勢。這項全面的研究旨在**引導**企業領袖度過市場的不確定性。這些創新的方法論**使**跨國公司**能夠**優化其商業**活動**。因此，高階主管的主要**任務**不再僅僅是要求員工去**熟記**過時的行為模式。

GroupB.title: 權威評論
GroupB.story: Fostering rigorous intellectual inquiry will invariably **enable** society to progress. To effectively **guide** the populace, the administration must undertake the arduous **task** of structural reform. We must **discover** resilient solutions rather than forcing citizens to merely **memorize** flawed policies of the past. Surviving this tumultuous fiscal **cycle** requires more than superficial political **activity**.
GroupB.translation: 培養嚴謹的智識探究將必然**使**社會**能夠**進步。為了有效地**引導**民眾，政府必須承擔起結構性改革的艱鉅**任務**。我們必須**發現**具韌性的解決方案，而不是僅僅強迫公民去**熟記**過去有缺陷的政策。要度過這個動盪的財政**週期**，需要的遠不止是表面的政治**活動**。

GroupC.title: 學生筆記
GroupC.story: I have a big math test tomorrow. It is a big **challenge** for me. I need to **review** my notes tonight. I cannot **skip** any pages in the book. I must **focus** on my study and turn off the TV. If I have a **difficulty** with a question, I will ask my brother. I will study on a **regular** basis from now on.
GroupC.translation: 我明天有一個重要的數學考試。對我來說這是一個很大的**挑戰**。我今晚需要**複習**我的筆記。我不能**跳過**書裡的任何一頁。我必須**專注於**我的學習並關掉電視。如果我在題目上遇到**困難**，我會問我哥哥。從現在開始，我會保持**規律的**學習。

GroupC.title: 業務溝通郵件
GroupC.story: Despite the short deadline, we must maintain **regular** updates. We need to **focus** on our customer's needs and never **skip** the weekly progress meetings. Please **review** the attached design file carefully. Our main **challenge** this month is the budget cut. We can overcome this **difficulty** if we work as a team.
GroupC.translation: 儘管期限很短，我們仍必須維持**定期的**更新。我們需要**專注於**客戶的需求，且絕不**省略**每週的進度會議。請仔細**審查**附件的設計檔案。我們這個月主要的**挑戰**是預算削減。如果我們發揮團隊合作精神，我們就能克服這個**困難**。

GroupC.title: 健康醫療專欄
GroupC.story: Overcoming the initial **difficulty** of changing habits is crucial for long-term health. Maintaining **regular** exercise requires strong willpower. Nutrition experts strongly suggest that you must **focus** on eating a balanced diet and never **skip** meals, especially breakfast. This can be a significant **challenge** for busy adults. However, a recent medical **review** clearly shows the long-lasting benefits of this lifestyle.
GroupC.translation: 克服改變習慣的初期**困難**對長遠的健康至關重要。維持**規律的**運動需要堅強的意志力。營養專家強烈建議，你必須**專注於**均衡飲食，且絕對不要**跳過**正餐不吃，尤其是早餐。這對忙碌的成年人來說可能是一項重大的**挑戰**。然而，最近的一項醫學**審查報告**清楚地顯示了這種生活方式所帶來的持久益處。

GroupC.title: 學術論文摘要
GroupC.story: The institutional **focus** must shift toward establishing a robust framework for continuous assessment. A systemic **difficulty** is deeply embedded within modern secondary education. The primary pedagogical **challenge** is to ensure that students engage in **regular** practice. They frequently **skip** foundational theoretical concepts in their rush to tackle complex problems. The latest academic **review** highlights this alarming trend.
GroupC.translation: 體制的**焦點**必須轉移至建立一個健全的持續評量框架。一個系統性的**困難**深植於現代中等教育內部。主要的教學**挑戰**在於確保學生進行**規律的**練習。他們在急於解決複雜問題時，經常會**跳過**基礎的理論概念。最新的學術**審查報告**突顯了這個令人擔憂的趨勢。

GroupC.title: 財經社論
GroupC.story: To **skip** rigorous oversight would inevitably invite catastrophic economic consequences. Navigating modern international trade presents a formidable **challenge** for seasoned economists. Corporate stakeholders must meticulously **review** shifting fiscal policies. The labyrinthine **difficulty** of global markets demands a **regular** restructuring of asset portfolios. Throughout this process, maintaining an unwavering **focus** on long-term stability is absolutely essential.
GroupC.translation: 若**省略**嚴謹的監督，將不可避免地招致災難性的經濟後果。駕馭現代國際貿易對經驗豐富的經濟學家而言構成了一項艱鉅的**挑戰**。企業利害關係人必須一絲不苟地**審查**不斷變動的財政政策。全球市場錯綜複雜的**困難**，要求對資產投資組合進行**定期的**重組。在此過程中，對長期穩定保持堅定不移的**專注**是絕對必要的。

groupBonus.title: 教育心理學術期刊
groupBonus.story: The modern educational **project** faces a formidable **challenge**: overcoming the systemic **difficulty** that students experience when attempting to merely **memorize** vast amounts of disconnected information. To effectively **guide** learners through this cognitive **cycle**, educators must undertake the crucial **task** of reforming traditional curricula. It is not enough to simply **organize** classroom **activity**; institutions must maintain an unwavering **focus** on meaningful engagement. Students frequently **struggle** because they **skip** fundamental concepts, neglecting the **regular** practice required to master complex theoretical nuances. By instituting a comprehensive **review** of current methodologies, schools can **discover** innovative pedagogical strategies. This will **enable** teachers to pay closer attention to every structural **detail**. Transforming the academic landscape is a monumental **mission** with profound **social** implications. If stakeholders commit to this endeavor, the ultimate **reward** will be a generation capable of critical thought rather than rote repetition.
groupBonus.translation: 現代的教育**專案計畫**面臨一項艱鉅的**挑戰**：克服學生在試圖僅僅**死記硬背**大量零散資訊時所經歷的系統性**困難**。為了有效地**引導**學習者度過這個認知**週期**，教育工作者必須承擔起改革傳統課綱的關鍵**任務**。僅僅**安排**課堂**活動**是不夠的；機構必須對有意義的參與保持堅定不移的**專注**。學生經常會**苦苦掙扎**，因為他們**跳過**了基礎概念，忽略了掌握複雜理論細微差別所需的**規律**練習。透過對現行方法論制定全面的**審查**，學校能夠**發現**創新的教學策略。這將**使**教師**能夠**更密切地關注每一個結構性**細節**。改變學術版圖是一項具有深遠**社會**意涵的紀念性**使命**。如果利害關係人致力於此項努力，最終的**回報**將是培養出一個具備批判性思考能力，而非只會死記硬背的世代。

GroupA.title: 旅遊日記
GroupA.story: I walked in the **forest** today. The tall trees seemed to **greet** me. I was in a very good **mood**. I did not see a **single** animal, but I saw a dark **shadow** moving. I really love the **diversity** of plants here.
GroupA.translation: 我今天在**森林**裡散步。高大的樹木似乎在**迎接**我。我的**心情**非常好。我沒有看到**單一**任何一隻動物，但我看到一個黑色的**影子**在移動。我真的很喜歡這裡植物的**多樣性**。

GroupA.title: 飯店評論
GroupA.story: The hotel staff will **greet** you with a warm smile. At night, every **shadow** looks beautiful under the moonlight. There is not a **single** dirty spot in the rooms. We enjoyed the **diversity** of the breakfast options. The relaxing **mood** made us want to stay longer, especially near the nearby **forest**.
GroupA.translation: 飯店員工會以溫暖的微笑**迎接**您。在夜晚，每一個**影子**在月光下都顯得美麗。房間裡沒有**單一**任何一個髒汙處。我們很享受早餐選擇的**多樣性**。令人放鬆的**氛圍**讓我們想待久一點，尤其是在附近的**森林**旁。

GroupA.title: 自然紀錄片旁白
GroupA.story: This island is famous for its biological **diversity**. Deep in the **forest**, the changing weather affects the **mood** of the landscape. When a cloud passes, a huge **shadow** covers the valley. Every morning, the birds **greet** the sun. Interestingly, not a **single** species here can be found anywhere else in the world.
GroupA.translation: 這座島嶼以其生物**多樣性**而聞名。在**森林**深處，不斷變化的天氣影響著風景的**氛圍**。當雲朵飄過時，巨大的**影子**會籠罩山谷。每天早晨，鳥兒們**迎接**太陽。有趣的是，這裡沒有**單一**任何一個物種能在世界上其他地方找到。

GroupA.title: 社會學摘要
GroupA.story: The study examines how urban architecture influences the collective **mood** of citizens. The **diversity** of building designs plays a crucial role. A **single** structural change can completely alter how public spaces **greet** visitors. For instance, creating a concrete **forest** instead of open parks casts a psychological **shadow** over the community.
GroupA.translation: 這項研究探討城市建築如何影響市民的集體**情緒**。建築設計的**多樣性**扮演著關鍵角色。**單一**的結構改變就能徹底改變公共空間**迎接**訪客的方式。例如，創造水泥**叢林**而非開放式公園，會給社區蒙上一層心理**陰影**。

GroupB.title: 旅遊部落格
GroupB.story: My **journey** to the old town was great. I had a beautiful **view** of the mountains. The blue sky seemed to **match** the river perfectly. At night, I bought a red **lantern**. It looked like a beautiful **painting**. I also ate some **classic** street food there.
GroupB.translation: 我到老城區的**旅程**很棒。我看到了美麗的山**景**。藍天似乎與河流完美**相配**。晚上，我買了一個紅色的**燈籠**。它看起來就像一幅美麗的**圖畫**。我也在那裡吃了一些**經典的**街頭美食。

GroupB.title: 藝術展宣傳單
GroupB.story: Come and see the new landscape **painting** at our gallery. It is a **classic** piece of art from the 19th century. The artist painted a stunning **view** of the sea. It takes you on a historical **journey**. The colors perfectly **match** the gallery's lighting. Each artwork is illuminated by a small **lantern**.
GroupB.translation: 歡迎來我們的畫廊欣賞新的風景**畫作**。這是一件來自19世紀的**經典**藝術品。藝術家畫下了令人驚嘆的海**景**。它帶您踏上一段歷史**之旅**。色彩與畫廊的燈光完美**相稱**。每件藝術品都被一盞小**燈籠**照亮著。

GroupB.title: 產品設計評論
GroupB.story: The new outdoor camping **lantern** is beautifully designed. Its sleek shape will **match** any modern tent perfectly. While it features a **classic** appearance, the technology inside is highly advanced. The matte finish resembles an oil **painting**. It provides a clear **view** of the campsite at night, making every outdoor **journey** safer.
GroupB.translation: 這款新型戶外露營**燈籠**設計優美。它流線型的外觀將與任何現代帳篷完美**相配**。雖然它具有**經典的**外觀，但其內部技術卻非常先進。霧面的表面處理類似於一幅油**畫**。它在夜間提供了清晰的營地**視野**，讓每一次的戶外**旅程**都更加安全。

GroupB.title: 文學評論
GroupB.story: In this **classic** novel, the protagonist embarks on a spiritual **journey**. The author's unique **view** on human nature is revealed chapter by chapter. The descriptive prose functions as a vivid **painting** of the era. A metaphorical **lantern** guides the reader through the dark themes, and these literary elements seamlessly **match** the underlying philosophical tone.
GroupB.translation: 在這本**經典**小說中，主角踏上了一段心靈**之旅**。作者對人性的獨特**觀點**逐章揭露。描述性的散文作用宛如該時代的一幅生動**畫作**。一盞隱喻性的**燈籠**引導讀者穿越黑暗的主題，而這些文學元素與潛在的哲學基調完美**相稱**。

GroupC.title: 訊息對話
GroupC.story: The baseball game had so much **energy**! The fans were **cheering** loudly. I watched the fast **motion** of the ball. We sat on **wooden** seats in the stadium. It was hot, but we found some **shade**. The whole game left a good **impression** on me.
GroupC.translation: 這場棒球比賽充滿了**活力**！球迷們大聲地**歡呼**。我觀看著球快速的**移動**。我們坐在體育場的**木製**座位上。天氣很熱，但我們找到了一些**陰涼處**。整場比賽給我留下了很好的**印象**。

GroupC.title: 家居裝飾廣告
GroupC.story: Upgrade your living room with our new **wooden** furniture. The light brown **shade** will make your house look warm. It will surely leave a great **impression** on your guests. The chairs are easy to move, requiring very little **motion**. They will bring a new, positive **energy** to your space, bringing **cheering** smiles to your family.
GroupC.translation: 用我們全新的**木製**家具升級您的客廳吧。淺褐色的**色調**將使您的房子看起來很溫暖。它肯定會給您的客人留下極佳的**印象**。這些椅子很容易移動，只需要非常微小的**動作**。它們將為您的空間帶來全新的正向**能量**，為您的家人帶來**令人高興的**笑容。

GroupC.title: 體育新聞
GroupC.story: The athlete's graceful **motion** across the field was breathtaking. He displayed incredible **energy** during the final lap. His performance made a profound **impression** on the coaches. The crowd kept **cheering** until the end of the race. After winning, he rested on a **wooden** bench under the **shade** of a large tree.
GroupC.translation: 這名運動員在場上優雅的**動作**令人嘆為觀止。他在最後一圈展現了難以置信的**活力**。他的表現給教練們留下了深刻的**印象**。群眾不斷**歡呼**直到比賽結束。獲勝後，他在大樹的**陰涼處**下的**木製**長椅上休息。

GroupC.title: 建築評論
GroupC.story: The building's grand facade leaves a striking **impression** on the observer. By utilizing a darker **shade** of glass, the architect controls the interior lighting. The integration of structural **wooden** beams adds warmth. The fluid **motion** of the curved roof is highly innovative. It has received **cheering** reviews from critics, injecting a vibrant **energy** into the urban landscape.
GroupC.translation: 建築物宏偉的正面給觀察者留下了引人注目的**印象**。透過使用較深**色調**的玻璃，建築師控制了室內採光。結構性**木製**橫樑的整合增添了溫暖感。弧形屋頂流暢的**動態**極具創新性。它獲得了評論家們**喝采的**評論，為城市景觀注入了充滿生氣的**活力**。

groupBonus.title: 文化遺產觀光專文
groupBonus.story: When cultural tourists embark on a **journey** to historical districts, they expect the landscape to **greet** them with authenticity. A **single** misstep in urban planning can ruin this experience. Planners must respect the **diversity** of local heritage. For instance, restoring a **classic** **wooden** temple requires meticulous attention to the original **shade** of paint, ensuring it resembles an antique **painting**. The dynamic **motion** of modern life often casts a threatening **shadow** over these quiet neighborhoods. However, when new designs harmoniously **match** the old structures, they create a cohesive **view** that elevates the overall **mood**. As evening falls, illuminating the streets with a traditional **lantern** can leave a profound **impression** on visitors. This careful balance prevents the area from becoming just another concrete **forest**. Instead, it injects a vibrant economic **energy** into the community, ultimately leading to the **cheering** approval of both residents and conservationists.
groupBonus.translation: 當文化觀光客踏上前去歷史街區的**旅程**時，他們期望風景能以真實性來**迎接**他們。都市計畫中**單一**的失誤就可能毀掉這種體驗。規劃者必須尊重當地遺產的**多樣性**。例如，修復一座**經典的** **木製**寺廟需要對油漆的原始**色調**給予一絲不苟的關注，確保它看起來像一幅古董**畫作**。現代生活**動態**的節奏經常給這些寧靜的社區蒙上具威脅性的**陰影**。然而，當新設計與舊建築和諧**相配**時，它們創造出了一種具凝聚力的**景觀**，提升了整體的**氛圍**。夜幕低垂時，用傳統的**燈籠**照亮街道，能給遊客留下深刻的**印象**。這種謹慎的平衡防止了該地區成為另一個水泥**叢林**。相反地，它為社區注入了充滿生氣的經濟**活力**，最終獲得了居民和保育人士**歡呼喝采的**認可。

GroupA.title: 學校攝影社
GroupA.story: Tom wanted to join the school photo club. He began his **search** online to find the club's webpage. He read all the **information** about the meeting times. With just one **click** of his mouse, he downloaded the application. Finishing the document was very **satisfying** because he loves taking pictures. However, he knew that his math grades could **affect** his chances. As a **consequence** of his low scores last week, he had to study harder. Finally, Tom sent the email and became an official **applicant** for the club.
GroupA.translation: Tom 想加入學校的攝影社。他開始在網路上**搜尋**以找到社團網頁。他閱讀了所有關於開會時間的**資訊**。只需**點擊**一下滑鼠，他就下載了申請表。完成這份文件讓人非常**滿足**，因為他喜歡拍照。然而，他知道他的數學成績可能會**影響**他的機會。由於上週成績低的**後果**，他必須更努力學習。最後，Tom 寄出了電子郵件，成為該社團的正式**申請人**。

GroupA.title: 人資面試審查郵件
GroupA.story: Dear HR Manager, I want to discuss the new **applicant** we interviewed today. Please **click** the link below to review her **information**. Our long **search** for an assistant has finally paid off. Her communication skills are highly **satisfying**. We hope hiring her will positively **affect** our team's daily workflow. The only **consequence** of this decision is that we will need to update our budget quickly.
GroupA.translation: 親愛的人資經理，我想討論一下我們今天面試的新**申請人**。請**點擊**下方連結以審查她的**資訊**。我們為了尋找助理而進行的漫長**搜尋**終於有了回報。她的溝通技巧非常令人**滿足**。我們希望雇用她能對我們團隊的日常工作流程產生正向的**影響**。這個決定唯一的**後果**是我們必須盡快更新我們的預算。

GroupA.title: 數位數據趨勢探討
GroupA.story: Modern technology has completely transformed how we **search** for digital data. Every **click** on a website provides companies with valuable **information** about user habits. These data-gathering methods deeply **affect** personal privacy. A major **consequence** is that an internet user is no longer just an anonymous **applicant** for a service, but a targeted consumer. Despite these concerns, many people still find personalized web experiences highly **satisfying**.
GroupA.translation: 現代科技完全改變了我們**搜尋**數位數據的方式。在網站上的每一次**點擊**都為公司提供了關於使用者習慣的寶貴**資訊**。這些資料收集方法深刻地**影響**了個人隱私。一個重大的**後果**是，網路使用者不再只是服務的匿名**申請人**，而是被鎖定的消費者。儘管有這些擔憂，許多人仍然覺得個人化的網路體驗非常令人**滿足**。

GroupA.title: 招募演算法學術論文
GroupA.story: This academic paper examines the long-term **consequence** of biased data algorithms in the job market. An innocent **applicant** might suffer silently if these hidden algorithms arbitrarily **affect** corporate hiring practices. Even a single **click** during an employer's background **search** can yield misleading **information** that is rarely **satisfying** in terms of objective accuracy.
GroupA.translation: 這篇學術論文探討了就業市場中偏頗數據演算法的長期**後果**。如果這些隱藏的演算法武斷地**影響**企業的招募實務，無辜的**申請人**可能會默默受害。雇主在進行背景**搜尋**時，即使只是單一的**點擊**，也可能產生誤導性的**資訊**，而這些資訊在客觀準確性上鮮少是令人**滿足**的。

GroupB.title: 線上遊戲評論
GroupB.story: I saw an online **advertisement** for a new video game today. Its bright **content** looked really fun. I wrote a nice **comment** below the video, but some people showed a strong **dislike** for it. They argued that playing too many games is not **harmless**. To stay safe online, my friends, **including** Amy, always hide their real **identity** when they play.
GroupB.translation: 我今天看到了一個新電玩的線上**廣告**。它色彩鮮豔的**內容**看起來真的很有趣。我在影片下方寫了一則很好的**評論**，但有些人對此表示強烈**厭惡**。他們主張玩太多遊戲並非是**無害的**。為了在網路上保持安全，我的朋友們（**包括** Amy）在玩遊戲時總是隱藏他們的真實**身分**。

GroupB.title: 行銷活動回饋報告
GroupB.story: The entire marketing team, **including** the graphic designer, reviewed the new campaign. We must carefully protect our brand **identity** this year. The digital **content** in the new **advertisement** looks fantastic. A loyal customer even left a positive **comment** on our website this morning. Even though a few competitors expressed their **dislike**, the overall feedback is completely **harmless** to our sales.
GroupB.translation: 整個行銷團隊（**包括**平面設計師）審查了新的宣傳活動。今年我們必須謹慎保護我們的品牌**身分**。新**廣告**中的數位**內容**看起來棒極了。今天早上，一位忠實顧客甚至在我們的網站上留下了一則正面的**評論**。即使少數競爭對手表達了他們的**不喜愛**，整體的反饋對我們的銷售是完全**無害的**。

GroupB.title: 健康應用程式隱私
GroupB.story: In the development of modern health apps, securing a user's digital **identity** is the top priority. Medical **content** shared on these platforms must be rigorously verified. One false **comment** about a treatment, particularly if promoted through a sponsored **advertisement**, is certainly not **harmless**. Medical professionals express a deep **dislike** for platforms that fail to monitor fake data, **including** misleading medical advice.
GroupB.translation: 在現代健康應用程式的開發中，保護使用者的數位**身分**是首要任務。在這些平台上分享的醫療**內容**必須經過嚴格驗證。關於療法的虛假**評論**（特別是如果透過贊助**廣告**來推廣），絕對不是**無害的**。醫療專業人員對未能監控虛假數據（**包括**誤導性醫療建議）的平台表達了深切的**厭惡**。

GroupB.title: 廣告社會學評論
GroupB.story: The rapid proliferation of sponsored **content** in modern digital media is rarely as **harmless** as tech companies claim. Active citizens, **including** leading sociologists, consistently voice their **dislike** for highly targeted marketing campaigns. Essentially, every personalized **advertisement** attempts to commodify a person's private **identity**, frequently reducing complex human behavior to a simple, predictable **comment** within a database.
GroupB.translation: 現代數位媒體中贊助**內容**的迅速氾濫，很少如科技公司所聲稱的那般**無害**。積極的公民（**包括**頂尖的社會學家）不斷對高度針對性的行銷活動表達他們的**厭惡**。本質上，每一個個人化**廣告**都試圖將個人的私密**身分**商品化，常常將複雜的人類行為簡化為資料庫中一則簡單、可預測的**評論**。

GroupC.title: 校園事件道歉信
GroupC.story: Some students posted an **offensive** joke on social media last night. This foolish action will surely **damage** their public **image** at school. The principal quickly shared his **opinion** about the situation. He asked the students to write an apology in the **form** of a letter. They hope the school will still **offer** them a chance to stay on the sports team.
GroupC.translation: 昨晚有些學生在社群媒體上發布了一個**冒犯的**笑話。這個愚蠢的行為肯定會**損害**他們在學校的公眾**形象**。校長很快地分享了他對這個情況的**看法**。他要求學生以信件的**形式**寫一封道歉信。他們希望學校仍然會**提供**他們留在運動校隊的機會。

GroupC.title: 企業形象策略會議
GroupC.story: As a growing company, we must maintain a highly professional **image** during the upcoming industry conference. Any **offensive** behavior from our staff will severely **damage** our hard-earned reputation. In my **opinion**, we should present our new project in a digital **form** to impress the clients. Furthermore, we can **offer** VIP event tickets to our most important sponsors.
GroupC.translation: 身為一間成長中的公司，我們必須在即將到來的產業會議中保持高度專業的**形象**。我們員工任何**冒犯的**行為都會嚴重**損害**我們得來不易的聲譽。依我之見（我的**想法**），我們應該以數位的**形式**展示我們的新專案以讓客戶留下深刻印象。此外，我們可以向最重要的贊助商**提供** VIP 活動門票。

GroupC.title: 颶風救災新聞報導
GroupC.story: The sudden hurricane caused unprecedented **damage** to the coastal city. Government relief funds quickly arrived, primarily taking the **form** of direct cash donations. However, the mayor had to **offer** a public apology to rescue his declining political **image**. Public **opinion** remained sharply divided on the issue, and frustrated citizens frequently used **offensive** language on the news forums.
GroupC.translation: 突如其來的颶風對這座沿海城市造成了史無前例的**損害**。政府的救災資金迅速抵達，主要採取直接現金捐贈的**形式**。然而，市長必須**提供**（發表）公開道歉，以挽救他不斷下滑的政治**形象**。大眾的**意見**在這個問題上仍然存在嚴重分歧，沮喪的市民經常在新聞論壇上使用**冒犯的**言辭。

GroupC.title: 政治操縱分析專文
GroupC.story: The deliberate orchestration of **offensive** rumors online has evolved into a potent **form** of social and political manipulation. Left unchecked, such tactics can irreparably **damage** a public figure's meticulously crafted **image**. Societal **opinion** inevitably becomes violently polarized when rival factions refuse to **offer** genuine transparency regarding their digital campaign strategies.
GroupC.translation: 在網路上蓄意策劃**冒犯的**謠言已經演變成一種強有力的社會與政治操縱**形式**。如果不加以控制，這種策略可能會對公眾人物精心打造的**形象**造成無法彌補的**損害**。當敵對派系拒絕對其數位選戰策略**提供**真正的透明度時，社會**輿論**不可避免地會變得極度兩極化。

groupBonus.title: 高階主管數位足跡評估
groupBonus.story: In the contemporary corporate landscape, the trace data we generate continues to **form** a permanent digital **identity**. Comprehensive repositories of personal **information** are easily uncovered during a routine executive **search**. These lingering digital footprints profoundly **affect** a professional's corporate **image**, and any historical indiscretion can severely **damage** their long-term credibility. For instance, an old, **offensive** post can instantly polarize public **opinion**, transforming a minor mistake into a widespread **dislike** among stakeholders. Every historic **comment** or thoughtless **click** on a malicious online **advertisement** shapes the thematic **content** associated with our name. While these individual interactions may initially appear **harmless**, the entire ecosystem of digital telemetry—**including** automated background checks—ensures that every action carries a lasting **consequence**. Achieving a **satisfying** career trajectory now requires absolute digital vigilance. Ultimately, a highly qualified **applicant** may find that an elite institution will abruptly rescind a prestigious executive **offer** simply because of an unmanaged online trail.
groupBonus.translation: 在當代的企業環境中，我們產生的軌跡數據持續**形成**一個永久的數位**身分**。在例行的高階主管**搜尋**中，個人的完整**資訊**庫很容易被揭露。這些揮之不去的數位足跡深刻地**影響**著專業人士的企業**形象**，任何歷史上的輕率行為都可能嚴重**損害**其長期公信力。例如，過去一篇**冒犯的**貼文可以立即引發大眾**想法**的兩極分化，將一個小錯誤轉化為利益相關者之間普遍的**厭惡**。過去在惡意網路**廣告**上的每一次歷史性**評論**或輕率的**點擊**，都在形塑與我們名字相關的主題**內容**。雖然這些個別的互動最初看起來可能是**無害的**，但數位遙測的整個生態系統（**包括**自動化背景審查）確保了每一項行為都帶來持久的**後果**。要取得令人**滿足**的職涯發展軌跡，現在需要絕對的數位警惕。最終，一位優秀的**申請人**可能會發現，僅僅因為未能妥善管理的網路痕跡，菁英機構就會突然撤回聲望崇高的主管**機會**。

GroupA.title: 日常對話
GroupA.story: My family loves to help in our **community** every year. We always go to the **annual** food festival to help out. We cook **various** foods to **serve** the hungry visitors. Sometimes my legs feel a lot of **pain** after walking all day. But my friends always **remind** me that it is fun. The festival is also very good for **tourism** in our small town.
GroupA.translation: 我的家人每年都喜歡在我們的社區裡幫忙。我們總是去年度的美食節幫忙。我們烹煮各式各樣的食物來供應給飢腸轆轆的遊客。有時走了一整天後，我的腿會感到非常痛苦（痠痛）。但是我的朋友們總是提醒我這很有趣。這個節慶對我們小鎮的觀光業也非常有好處。

GroupA.title: 商務電子郵件
GroupA.story: Dear Team, we are planning our **annual** hotel event to boost **tourism** in the city. We will **serve** our guests **various** drinks and special snacks. Please **remind** everyone to arrive early for the preparation. To avoid back **pain** while carrying heavy boxes, please use the trolleys. This event is very important for our business **community**.
GroupA.translation: 團隊您好，我們正在策劃我們飯店的年度活動，以促進這座城市的觀光業。我們將為賓客供應各式各樣的飲料與特別小吃。請提醒大家提早抵達進行準備。為了避免搬運重箱子時造成背部疼痛，請使用推車。這項活動對我們的商業群體非常重要。

GroupA.title: 醫療與趨勢報導
GroupA.story: Medical **tourism** is growing very fast worldwide. Patients from **various** countries travel abroad to seek better treatments and cure their physical **pain**. Every **annual** report shows an increase in patient numbers. Doctors must **serve** these patients well and **remind** them to rest after surgery. The global medical **community** is paying close attention to this new trend.
GroupA.translation: 醫療觀光業在全球發展得非常快。來自各式各樣國家的病患出國尋求更好的治療並治癒身體的痛苦。每一份年度的報告都顯示病患人數在增加。醫生必須良好地為這些病患服務（看診），並提醒他們在手術後要休息。全球醫療界（群體）正密切關注這個新趨勢。

GroupA.title: 社會學社論
GroupA.story: The revival of eco-**tourism** plays a pivotal role in the economic recovery of the **community**. According to the **annual** fiscal review, addressing the economic **pain** of marginalized regions is crucial. Authorities must **serve** these areas by implementing **various** sustainable policies. Scholars constantly **remind** us that unchecked development could permanently harm the delicate ecosystem.
GroupA.translation: 生態觀光業的復甦在社區的經濟復甦中扮演著關鍵角色。根據年度財政審查，解決邊緣化地區的經濟痛苦至關重要。當局必須透過實施各式各樣的永續政策來為這些地區服務。學者不斷提醒我們，不受限制的開發可能會對脆弱的生態系統造成永久性的傷害。

GroupB.title: 生活情境
GroupB.story: We love to **celebrate** the New Year together. It is a **traditional** holiday in my country. We always feel **grateful** for our family. **Besides** eating a big dinner, we also watch beautiful fireworks. Our parents tell us it is our **duty** to be good kids. The city **government** also holds a big party, but we have a heavy **dependence** on public buses to get there.
GroupB.translation: 我們喜歡一起慶祝新年。這是我們國家的一個傳統的節日。我們總是對我們的家人感到感激。除了吃豐盛的晚餐之外，我們還會看美麗的煙火。我們的父母告訴我們，做個好孩子是我們的責任。市政府也會舉辦一個大型派對，但我們非常依賴搭乘公車去那裡。

GroupB.title: 工作宣導
GroupB.story: Our **government** announced a new green policy today. It is our **duty** to reduce our **dependence** on plastic bags. We should start using **traditional** cloth bags instead. **Besides** this, we can also recycle more paper in the office. If we do well, we will **celebrate** our success at the end of the year. Mother Earth will be very **grateful** for our actions.
GroupB.translation: 我們的政府今天宣布了一項新的綠色政策。減少對塑膠袋的依賴是我們的義務。我們應該開始改用傳統的布袋。除此之外，我們還可以在辦公室回收更多紙張。如果我們做得好，我們將在年底慶祝我們的成功。地球母親將會對我們的行動非常感激。

GroupB.title: 科技與環境報導
GroupB.story: As the global economy changes, the **government** must find new energy sources. Reducing the nation's **dependence** on imported oil is a critical **duty** for leaders. **Besides** solar power, wind energy is also a great option. We cannot rely only on **traditional** power plants anymore. When we achieve this clean energy goal, the entire nation will **celebrate**. Future generations will be deeply **grateful** for these policies.
GroupB.translation: 隨著全球經濟的變化，政府必須尋找新的能源。減少國家對進口石油的依賴是領導人的一項關鍵責任。除了太陽能之外，風能也是一個極好的選擇。我們不能再只依賴傳統的發電廠。當我們實現這個清潔能源的目標時，全國人民都將會慶祝。後代子孫將會對這些政策深表感激。

GroupB.title: 學術評論
GroupB.story: The modern welfare state has significantly deepened citizens' **dependence** on public services. Fulfilling one's civic **duty** is now often equated with compliance to the **government**. **Besides** the obvious economic impacts, this shift challenges **traditional** familial support structures. Sociologists argue that we should not merely **celebrate** policy expansions without critical analysis. Ultimately, while society is **grateful** for a safety net, individual autonomy must be preserved.
GroupB.translation: 現代福利國家顯著加深了公民對公共服務的依賴。履行公民義務現在常常被等同於對政府的順從。除了明顯的經濟影響之外，這種轉變挑戰了傳統的家庭支持結構。社會學家主張，我們不應在缺乏批判性分析的情況下，僅僅只是慶祝政策的擴張。最終，儘管社會對安全網感到感激，但仍必須維護個人的自主權。

GroupC.title: 校園生活
GroupC.story: In our **local** school, we learned about art **culture** today. A **recent** project asked us to draw a big picture. I used a lot of **strength** to color it brightly. It was a big **accomplishment** when I finally finished. I wanted to **express** my happy feelings. My drawing will **feature** a big blue bird singing in the tree.
GroupC.translation: 在我們當地的學校裡，我們今天學習了藝術文化。一個最近的作業要求我們畫一張大圖。我用了很大的力氣把它塗得很明亮。當我終於完成時，這是一項很大的成就。我想要表達我開心的心情。我的畫作將以一隻在樹上唱歌的藍色大鳥為特色。

GroupC.title: 活動企劃
GroupC.story: Our company will host a **local** music festival next month. A **recent** email stated that the event will **feature** many famous rock singers. We want to promote our unique street **culture** to young people. It takes a lot of team **strength** to organize this big show. We want to **express** our thanks to all the workers. Finishing this project smoothly will be a great **accomplishment**.
GroupC.translation: 我們公司下個月將主辦一場當地的音樂節。一封最近的電子郵件指出，該活動將以許多著名的搖滾歌手為主要特色。我們想向年輕人推廣我們獨特的街頭文化。組織這場大型表演需要很大的團隊力量。我們想對所有的工作人員表達感謝。順利完成這個專案將是一項偉大的成就。

GroupC.title: 健康與生活
GroupC.story: A **recent** medical study explores the health of **local** citizens. Regular weight training greatly increases muscle **strength**. Furthermore, many modern gyms now **feature** yoga and meditation classes. This reflects a positive shift in our fitness **culture**. Participants often **express** immense joy and peace after a workout. For many, completing a full marathon is seen as a remarkable **accomplishment**.
GroupC.translation: 一項最近的醫學研究探討了當地居民的健康狀況。規律的重量訓練能大幅增加肌肉力量。此外，許多現代健身房現在以瑜伽和冥想課程為特色。這反映了我們健身文化的積極轉變。參與者在運動後常常會表達出極大的喜悅與平靜。對許多人來說，完成一場全程馬拉松被視為一項非凡的成就。

GroupC.title: 歷史與人文探索
GroupC.story: In **recent** sociological discourse, the preservation of indigenous **culture** is paramount. A prominent documentary will soon **feature** exclusive interviews with **local** tribal elders. They articulately detail their historical trauma and resilient inner **strength**. Their ability to **express** such profound narratives is a testament to human endurance. Recording and archiving these oral histories is an academic **accomplishment** of the highest order.
GroupC.translation: 在最近的社會學論述中，原住民文化的保存是至關重要的。一部知名的紀錄片很快將以對當地部落長老的獨家專訪為重點特色。他們清楚地詳述了他們的歷史創傷和堅韌的內在力量。他們能夠表達如此深刻敘事的能力，是人類忍耐力的證明。記錄並歸檔這些口述歷史是最高級別的學術成就。

groupBonus.title: 社會經濟改革與文化復興論述
groupBonus.story: To mitigate the economic **pain** caused by over-reliance on mass manufacturing, the **local** **government** initiated a comprehensive reform. The primary **duty** of this policy was to reduce **dependence** on imported goods while fostering regional **strength**. A **recent** urban development project sought to revive the area's **traditional** **culture**. As part of this initiative, the **annual** heritage festival was expanded to promote sustainable **tourism**. Organizers managed to **serve** international visitors with **various** authentic exhibitions that elegantly **feature** indigenous artistry. **Besides** attracting global attention, the event helped the marginalized **community** reclaim its narrative. Scholars frequently **remind** us that such endeavors require monumental effort. To **express** their identity freely is a profound right for these artisans. The festival's overwhelming success stands as a remarkable **accomplishment**. When we gather to **celebrate** these milestones, we build a society that is not only resilient but deeply **grateful** for its historical roots.
groupBonus.translation: 為了減輕因過度依賴大規模製造業而造成的經濟痛苦，當地政府發起了一項全面的改革。這項政策的首要責任是減少對進口商品的依賴，同時培養地區的力量。一項最近的都市發展計畫試圖復興該地區的傳統的文化。作為該倡議的一部分，年度的遺產節被擴大舉辦以促進永續的觀光業。主辦方成功地為國際遊客供應了各式各樣的真實展覽，這些展覽優雅地以原住民藝術為特色。除了吸引全球的目光之外，該活動還幫助邊緣化的社區重新奪回其敘事權。學者經常提醒我們，這類努力需要巨大的付出。能自由地表達他們的身份是這些工匠一項深遠的權利。該節慶的壓倒性成功是一項非凡的成就。當我們齊聚一堂慶祝這些里程碑時，我們建立的社會不僅充滿韌性，且對其歷史根源深表感激。

GroupA.title: 日常對話
GroupA.story: I want to **introduce** my new friend. She likes to draw a **figure** of a cat. Her **design** is very **creative**. I **manage** to help her with the colors. The colors **reflect** her happy mood. When she finishes, she gives me a **signal**.
GroupA.translation: 我想**介紹**我的新朋友。她喜歡畫貓的**圖案（形象）**。她的**設計**非常**有創意的**。我**設法**幫她上色。這些顏色**反映出**她快樂的心情。當她完成時，她給了我一個**信號**。

GroupA.title: 商務電子郵件
GroupA.story: Next week, we will **introduce** our new product **design** to the customers. We need to **manage** our time well. The sales **figure** must **reflect** our hard work. Please give a clear **signal** before you start the presentation. Your ideas should be very **creative**.
GroupA.translation: 下週，我們將向客戶**介紹**我們的新產品**設計**。我們需要好好**管理**我們的時間。銷售**數字**必須**反映出**我們的辛勤工作。在您開始簡報前，請給出明確的**信號**。您的想法應該非常**有創造力**。

GroupA.title: 科技與環境報導
GroupA.story: To **manage** a successful marketing campaign, you must **introduce** a highly **creative** **design** that catches the eye. The latest market **figure** should **reflect** consumer preferences. A strong positive **signal** from the buyers means we are on the right track.
GroupA.translation: 為了**管理（經營）**一場成功的行銷活動，你必須**引進（推出）**一個非常引人注目且**有創意的****設計**。最新的市場**數據**應該**反映出**消費者的偏好。來自買家的強烈正面**信號**意味著我們正走在正確的軌道上。

GroupA.title: 學術論文摘要
GroupA.story: Modern urban **design** options must carefully **reflect** historical identity. Architects often look at a prominent historical **figure** to **introduce** a sense of continuity. Through **creative** synthesis, they **manage** to balance aesthetics with utility. Every architectural **signal** points toward a smarter future city.
GroupA.translation: 現代都市**設計**的選擇必須謹慎地**反映出**歷史主體性。建築師經常研究傑出的歷史**人物**，以**帶入（介紹）**一種延續感。透過**有創造力的**綜合重組，他們**成功做到**平衡美學與實用性。每一個建築**信號**都指向一個更智慧的未來城市。

GroupB.title: 校園生活
GroupB.story: My favorite **character** is a funny dog. To my **amusement**, he can **add** numbers. He uses a special **symbol** to **communicate** with his friends. He never feels **pressured** by tests.
GroupB.translation: 我最喜歡的卡通**人物**是一隻搞笑的狗。令我感到**有趣**的是，他能把數字**相加**。他使用一個特別的**符號（象徵）**來與朋友**溝通**。他從不會因為考試而**感到壓力**。

GroupB.title: 工作進度報告
GroupB.story: We must **communicate** clearly with the new team. Please **add** the company **symbol** to the document. Do not feel **pressured** about the tight deadline. A good worker shows strong **character**. Much to our **amusement**, the boss loved the report.
GroupB.translation: 我們必須與新團隊清楚地**溝通**。請將公司的**標誌（象徵）****添加**到文件中。不要因為緊迫的截止日期而**感到有壓力**。一位好員工會展現出堅強的**性格（特質）**。令我們**欣喜（覺得有趣）**的是，老闆非常喜歡這份報告。

GroupB.title: 文學與閱讀
GroupB.story: In the novel, the main **character** uses a hidden **symbol** to **communicate** secret messages. As the plot develops, the author continues to **add** unexpected twists. The hero often feels **pressured** by his enemies. However, to the reader's **amusement**, he always escapes cleverly.
GroupB.translation: 在小說中，主要**角色**使用一個隱藏的**符號（象徵）**來**傳達（溝通）**秘密訊息。隨著情節發展，作者不斷**添加**意想不到的轉折。男主角經常因為敵人而**感到壓力重重**。然而，令讀者感到**有趣**的是，他總是能巧妙地逃脫。

GroupB.title: 心理學與社會評論
GroupB.story: Although constantly **pressured** by external forces, the protagonist's complex **character** serves as a profound **symbol** of societal anxiety. To effectively **communicate** this theme, the author decides to **add** layers of psychological conflict. His journey provides intellectual **amusement** rather than mere tragedy.
GroupB.translation: 儘管不斷受到外在力量的**壓迫（感到壓力）**，主角複雜的**性格（特質）**卻作為社會焦慮的深刻**象徵**。為了有效地**傳達**這個主題，作者決定**添加**多層次的心理衝突。他的旅程提供了智識上的**樂趣**，而不僅僅是一場悲劇。

GroupC.title: 日常對話
GroupC.story: I went to an art **exhibition** today. My family came to **support** me. I stood on the **stage** to talk. I played a small **role** in the show. We hope to **increase** our ticket sales. I will **deliver** the money to the teacher.
GroupC.translation: 我今天去了一個藝術**展覽會**。我的家人來**支持**我。我站在**舞台（階段）**上講話。我在表演中扮演了一個小**角色**。我們希望能**增加**門票銷量。我會把錢**遞送（交）**給老師。

GroupC.title: 業務溝通郵件
GroupC.story: Our company will host a trade **exhibition** next month. We must **deliver** the goods on time. Your **support** plays an important **role** in our success. In the final planning **stage**, we aim to **increase** our production speed.
GroupC.translation: 我們公司下個月將舉辦一場貿易**展覽會**。我們必須準時**交付（遞送）**貨物。您的**支持**在我們的成功中扮演著重要的**角色**。在最後的規劃**階段**，我們的目標是**增加**我們的生產速度。

GroupC.title: 公共工程與環境報導
GroupC.story: The museum is organizing a special **exhibition** on green energy. Public **support** plays a crucial **role** in protecting the environment. At this critical **stage**, the government must **deliver** new policies to **increase** the use of solar power.
GroupC.translation: 博物館正在籌辦一場關於綠色能源的特別**展覽會**。大眾的**支持**在保護環境方面扮演著至關重要的**角色**。在這個關鍵**階段**，政府必須**頒布（傳達/遞送）**新政策以**增加**太陽能的使用。

GroupC.title: 建築與永續發展論述
GroupC.story: A prominent international **exhibition** recently highlighted the vital **role** of sustainable architecture. During the initial conceptual **stage**, developers garnered widespread financial **support**. Their primary objective is to **deliver** eco-friendly housing solutions that exponentially **increase** urban resilience.
GroupC.translation: 最近一場著名的國際**展覽會**突顯了永續建築的關鍵**角色**。在最初的概念**階段**，開發商獲得了廣泛的財務**支持**。他們的主要目標是**提供（遞送）**環保的住宅解決方案，以成倍地**增加**城市的韌性。

groupBonus.title: 都市復興與文化基建深度專文
groupBonus.story: In the final **stage** of urban revitalization, the city council decided to **introduce** a highly **creative** **design** for public spaces. At the center of the new cultural **exhibition**, a towering geometric **figure** was erected to serve as a powerful **symbol** of unity. This installation was specifically engineered to **reflect** real-time pedestrian movements through an intricate digital **signal**. To **manage** the massive **increase** in tourism, authorities had to **add** robust infrastructure, ensuring they could **deliver** flawless public services. Despite feeling intensely **pressured** by looming fiscal deadlines, the planning committee maintained their steadfast **character** and professional resolve. Their efforts garnered widespread community **support**, allowing them to effectively **communicate** their vision. Much to the **amusement** of international critics, this ambitious project now plays a pivotal **role** in redefining modern civic identity.
groupBonus.translation: 在都市復興的最後**階段**，市議會決定為公共空間**引進**一項極具**創意的****設計**。在全新文化**展覽會**的中心，豎立了一座高聳的幾何**結構（圖形/形象）**，作為團結的強大**象徵**。這個裝置經過特別設計，能透過複雜的數位**信號**來**反映**行人的即時動態。為了**管理（應對）**觀光業的大幅**增加**，當局必須**添加**穩固的基礎設施，確保他們能**提供（遞送）**完美無瑕的公共服務。儘管因逼近的財政期限而**感到極度壓力**，規劃委員會仍保持了他們堅定的**品格（特質）**與專業的決心。他們的努力獲得了廣泛的社區**支持**，使他們能夠有效地**傳達（溝通）**他們的願景。令國際評論家感到**饒富趣味**的是，這項雄心勃勃的計畫現在在重新定義現代公民認同方面扮演著舉足輕重的**角色**。

mission.eng_def: an important task that is given to someone
mission.example: These students are on a mission to raise money for children in need.
mission.translation: 這些學生正在執行一項為需要幫助的兒童募款的任務。

guide.eng_def: a person who directs other people on a journey
guide.example: The lake is deep in the mountains, and visitors may get lost if they go there without a guide.
guide.translation: 這座湖泊位在深山中，如果沒有嚮導，遊客前往那裡可能會迷路。

derivatives.eng_def: to direct or influence the behavior or development of someone or something
derivatives.example: Please follow the steps, and they will guide you through the task.
derivatives.translation: 請遵循這些步驟，它們將會指引您完成這項任務。

struggle.eng_def: to fight against something or someone
struggle.example: Denny is poor at math, and he often struggles with the exercises in his math workbook.
struggle.translation: 丹尼的數學很差，他經常在數學作業本的練習題上苦苦掙扎。

derivatives.eng_def: a very difficult task that you can do only by making a great effort
derivatives.example: The famous singer bravely shared her struggles against stress to encourage her fans.
derivatives.translation: 這位著名歌手勇敢地分享了她對抗壓力的奮鬥過程，以此鼓勵她的歌迷。

difficulty.eng_def: a problem or something that causes trouble
difficulty.example: Students with learning difficulties often need help from their teachers and parents.
difficulty.translation: 有學習困難的學生通常需要老師和父母的幫助。

challenge.eng_def: something difficult that tests one's determination, skills, or ability
challenge.example: When Joy studied in New York, she faced many challenges.
challenge.translation: 喬伊在紐約求學時，面臨了許多挑戰。

memorize.eng_def: to remember something by learning it well
memorize.example: It isn't easy for teachers to memorize every student's name in a short time, especially when they teach more than one class.
memorize.translation: 老師要在短時間內熟記每位學生的名字並不容易，尤其是當他們任教超過一個班級時。

derivatives.eng_def: the ability to remember information, experiences, and people
derivatives.example: Rebecca has a terrible memory for dates, and that's why she often forgets her friends' birthdays and important meetings.
derivatives.translation: 蕾貝卡對日期的記性很差，這就是為什麼她經常忘記朋友的生日和重要的會議。

project.eng_def: a study of a subject for a course in school, usually done over a period of time
project.example: For her project on a famous king in history, Ann decided to write about Louis XIV.
project.translation: 為了她關於歷史上著名國王的專題研究，安決定撰寫關於路易十四的內容。

activity.eng_def: something that is done for a purpose
activity.chi_def: (為達成某目的而進行的)活動
activity.example: Biking, camping, jogging, and mountain climbing are all common outdoor activities people usually do.
activity.translation: 騎自行車、露營、慢跑和爬山都是人們通常會做的常見戶外活動。

derivatives.eng_def: a situation in which many things are happening or being done
derivatives.example: Several studies have shown that human activity is one of the main causes of many serious problems, such as forest fires and air pollution.
derivatives.translation: 數項研究顯示，人類活動是許多嚴重問題的主要原因之一，例如森林大火和空氣污染。

derivatives.eng_def: doing a lot of things, or moving around a lot
derivatives.example: Victoria has joined many school clubs and made lots of friends. Clearly, she leads an active school life.
derivatives.translation: 維多利亞參加了許多學校社團，並交了許多朋友。很顯然地，她過著活躍的學校生活。

social.example: Developing good social skills will help you make new friends more easily.
social.translation: 培養良好的社交技巧將幫助你更容易結交新朋友。

derivatives.eng_def: relating to people in a community and the way they live
derivatives.example: When a lot of people are out of work, it can lead to serious social problems.
derivatives.translation: 當許多人失業時，可能會導致嚴重的社會問題。

derivatives.eng_def: a large group of people who live together in an organized way
derivatives.example: In a healthy society, everyone-young and old, rich and poor-should be taken good care of and treated fairly.
derivatives.translation: 在一個健康的社會中，每個人——無論老少、貧富——都應該得到妥善的照顧並受到公平的對待。

focus.eng_def: to give a lot of attention to someone or something
focus.example: There were so many phone calls coming in this morning that I couldn't focus on my work.
focus.translation: 今天早上打來的電話太多了，以至於我無法專注於我的工作。

derivatives.eng_def: the main or central point of something, especially of attention or interest
derivatives.example: Erica wore a shiny dress to the party, and she quickly became the focus of attention there.
derivatives.translation: 艾莉卡穿著一件閃亮的洋裝參加派堆，她很快就成為了那裡注目的焦點。

reward.eng_def: something that one gets for good work
reward.example: All the workers were treated to a nice trip to Japan as a reward for their hard work in the past year.
reward.translation: 所有員工都獲贈了一趟美好的日本之旅，做為他們過去一年辛勤工作的回報。

derivatives.eng_def: to give someone a reward
derivatives.example: After the boy found Ms. Davis's missing purse, she rewarded him with NT$1,000.
derivatives.translation: 在男孩找到戴維斯女士遺失的錢包後，她用新台幣 1,000 元酬謝了他。

cycle.eng_def: a series of related events that happen again and again in the same order
cycle.example: Spring, summer, fall, and winter make a full cycle of four seasons each year.
cycle.translation: 春、夏、秋、冬構成了每年四季的完整循環。

review.eng_def: the act of studying something again to remember and understand it better
review.example: I always do a quick review and go over all the key points in my notes before exams.
review.translation: 我總是在考試前做個快速的複習，並把筆記裡所有的重點看過一遍。

derivatives.eng_def: a careful examination of something
derivatives.example: In the meeting, the boss asked for a full review of the plan before any changes were made.
derivatives.translation: 在會議中，老闆要求在做出任何變更之前，對計畫進行全面的審查。

derivatives.eng_def: to think or talk about something again, in order to make changes to it or to make a decision about it
derivatives.example: The manager needs to review the report one more time before she sends it to the head office.
derivatives.translation: 經理需要在把報告發送給總公司之前再審核一次。

regular.eng_def: happening again and again at the same time or in the same way
regular.example: Regular exercise is good for your health, so doctors suggest working out three times a week.
regular.translation: 規律的運動對你的健康有益，所以醫生建議每週運動三次。

enable.eng_def: to allow someone or something to do something
enable.example: The high speed rail enables people to travel from Taichung to Taipei in about an hour.
enable.translation: 高鐵使人們能夠在大約一小時內從台中旅行到台北。

organize.example: To make sure that he has enough time to finish everything, Mr. Morris organizes his schedule carefully.
organize.translation: 為了確保他有足夠的時間完成每一件事，莫里斯先生仔細地安排他的行程。

derivatives.eng_def: a group of people who work together in an organized way for a shared purpose
derivatives.example: The United Nations is one of the most important international organizations in the world.
derivatives.translation: 聯合國是世界上最重要的國際組織之一。

task.eng_def: a piece of work that someone needs to do, especially a difficult or unpleasant one
task.example: It will be impossible to carry out the new task if we don't have enough money.
task.translation: 如果我們沒有足夠的資金，將不可能執行這項新任務。

skip.example: Don't skip breakfast just because you are in a hurry. It gives you the energy you need for the whole morning.
skip.translation: 不要只因為匆忙就跳過早餐。它提供了你整個早上所需的能量。

detail.eng_def: a small fact or piece of information about something
detail.example: Let's talk about the big idea first and save the small details for later.
detail.translation: 我們先討論大方向的想法，把小細節留到稍後再說。

discover.example: Many people discover a love of reading when they find the right book.
discover.translation: 許多人在找到適合的書時，會發現自己對閱讀的熱愛。

derivatives.eng_def: the process of finding information, a place, or an object, especially for the first time
derivatives.example: The discovery of oil under the ground has helped the country become one of the richest in the world.
derivatives.translation: 在地底發現石油，幫助了該國成為世界上最富有的國家之一。

greet.eng_def: to be the first thing someone notices when they arrive somewhere
greet.chi_def: (影像、聲音、氣味等)呈現於……之前
greet.example: The delicious smell of freshly baked bread greeted us when we walked into the bakery.
greet.translation: 當我們走進麵包店時，剛出爐麵包的美味香氣撲鼻而來。

derivatives.eng_def: to welcome someone in a friendly way
derivatives.example: Roger greeted everyone in the office with a bright smile. He seemed to be in a good mood.
derivatives.translation: 羅傑帶著燦爛的笑容向辦公室裡的每個人打招呼。他似乎心情很好。

single.example: Phoebe hasn't answered Felix's calls or replied to a single text message from him since they had a heated argument last week.
single.translation: 自從上週發生激烈爭吵後，菲比就一直沒有接費利克斯的電話，也沒有回覆過他任何一則簡訊。

mood.eng_def: the feeling that a place or scene gives
mood.example: The sad movie changed the mood in the room. Everyone became quiet.
mood.translation: 這部悲傷的電影改變了房間裡的氣氛。每個人都安靜了下來。

derivatives.eng_def: the way a person feels at a certain time
derivatives.example: After hearing the good news, Mia was in a great mood and sang all the way home.
derivatives.translation: 聽到這個好消息後，蜜亞心情極佳，一路哼著歌回家。

diversity.eng_def: the state of including many kinds of people or things
diversity.example: The president of the university invited the foreign students to share their life stories to encourage cultural diversity.
diversity.translation: 大學校長邀請外籍學生分享他們的生命故事，以鼓勵文化多樣性。

derivatives.eng_def: including many different types of people or things
derivatives.example: This magazine covers a diverse range of topics, from travel and sports to science and technology.
derivatives.translation: 這本雜誌涵蓋了多樣化的主題，從旅遊、體育到科學與科技。

shadow.eng_def: the dark area caused on a surface when someone or something blocks light
shadow.example: In a cinema, anyone who stands and blocks the projector would cast a shadow on the screen.
shadow.translation: 在電影院裡，任何站起來擋住投影機的人都會在螢幕上投下影子。

derivatives.eng_def: to follow someone closely in order to watch them
derivatives.example: The police have been shadowing the suspect for a month, trying to gather information to find out if he was involved in the crime.
derivatives.translation: 警方已經尾隨該名嫌疑犯一個月，試圖收集資訊以查明他是否涉嫌該起犯罪。

forest.eng_def: a large area covered with many trees
forest.example: A mountain forest stood behind the village, and people could hear birds there every morning.
forest.translation: 村莊後面有一片山林，人們每天早上都能在那裡聽到鳥鳴。

match.eng_def: to go well with something because the color, style, or quality is similar
match.example: Karen matched her red shoes with a red bag, and everyone noticed her bright style.
match.translation: 凱倫將她的紅鞋搭配紅色的包包，每個人都注意到了她亮眼的造型。

classic.eng_def: accepted as an excellent example of a style that people have valued for a long time
classic.example: My father still reads a classic novel from his school days every summer.
classic.translation: 我父親每年夏天仍然會閱讀他學生時代的一本經典小說。

view.eng_def: the things that someone sees from a particular place or area
view.example: During their trip to Penghu, Jack and Eileen had a beautiful view of the sea from their hotel room.
view.translation: 在澎湖之旅期間，傑克和艾琳從飯店房間欣賞到了美麗的海景。

derivatives.eng_def: one's opinions, beliefs, or ideas about something
derivatives.example: My wife and I have different views on how to spend our money, so we often argue about this.
derivatives.translation: 我妻子和我對於如何花錢有著不同的觀點，所以我們經常為此爭吵。

derivatives.eng_def: to think about someone or something in a particular way
derivatives.example: Oliver views his brother as a role model and works very hard to be like him.
derivatives.translation: 奧利佛將他的哥哥視為榜樣，並非常努力地想要像他一樣。

journey.eng_def: an occasion of traveling from one place to another
journey.example: The couple went on a journey to a foreign country during their vacation to relieve stress from their work.
journey.translation: 這對夫婦在假期中去國外旅行，以減輕他們的工作壓力。

derivatives.eng_def: the process of a person's or a thing's development
derivatives.example: The novel shows the journey of a little girl's growth, from being childish and immature to becoming independent and responsible.
derivatives.translation: 這本小說展現了一個小女孩從幼稚不成熟到變得獨立負責的成長歷程。

painting.eng_def: a picture made with paint, usually on paper or canvas
painting.example: On the classroom wall hung a Chinese painting of mountains and a small river.
painting.translation: 教室的牆上掛著一幅描繪群山和小河的中國畫。

lantern.eng_def: a lamp in a case, often used outdoors or for decoration
lantern.example: On the festival night, each child carried a paper lantern down the street.
lantern.translation: 在節慶的夜晚，每個孩子都提著紙燈籠走在街上。

cheering.eng_def: used for making noise to support a team or player
cheering.example: The students hit their cheering sticks loudly when the final point was scored.
cheering.translation: 當拿下最後一分時，學生們大聲地敲擊他們的加油棒。

derivatives.eng_def: giving people hope or making them feel happier
derivatives.chi_def: 令人振奮的，使人高興的
derivatives.example: The doctor gave us cheering news and said my grandfather could go home the next day.
derivatives.translation: 醫生給了我們令人振奮的消息，並說我祖父隔天就可以回家了。

derivatives.eng_def: to give a loud shout of approval or encouragement
derivatives.example: We all cheered for our class team when the game entered the last minute.
derivatives.translation: 當比賽進入最後一分鐘時，我們都為班級代表隊歡呼。

derivatives.eng_def: happy and positive in feeling or attitude
derivatives.example: Even on rainy days, our teacher stays cheerful and greets every student with a smile.
derivatives.translation: 即使在下雨天，我們的老師依然保持開朗，並微笑著向每位學生打招呼。

wooden.example: The old shop had a wooden door that opened with a long, low sound.
wooden.translation: 那家老店有一扇木門，推開時會發出悠長低沉的聲音。

energy.eng_def: the strong feeling of action, power, or liveliness
energy.example: The dance team was full of energy, and even the people in the back row could feel it.
energy.translation: 這支舞蹈隊伍充滿了活力，甚至連後排的人都能感受得到。

derivatives.eng_def: having or involving a lot of energy
derivatives.chi_def: 精力充沛的，充滿活力的
derivatives.example: After a short rest, the children became energetic again and ran back to the playground.
derivatives.translation: 經過短暫休息後，孩子們又恢復了精力，跑回了遊樂場。

shade.eng_def: a slightly different form of the same color
shade.example: The painter used a shade of green to show the trees after the rain.
shade.translation: 畫家使用了一種不同深淺的綠色來呈現雨後的樹木。

motion.example: Keep your seat belt on when the bus is in motion so you don't get badly injured in an accident.
motion.translation: 公車行進中請繫好安全帶，以免在意外中受到重傷。

impression.eng_def: an opinion that people have about someone or something
impression.example: The company's well-designed website leaves a good impression on its own customers.
impression.translation: 該公司設計精良的網站給客戶留下了良好的印象。

derivatives.eng_def: to cause someone to admire or respect you
derivatives.example: Daniel impressed everyone in his class with his excellent Spanish speaking skills.
derivatives.translation: 丹尼爾以其出色的西班牙語口說技巧讓班上每個人都印象深刻。

derivatives.eng_def: evoking admiration through size, quality, or skill
derivatives.example: The view from the top of the mountain was very impressive because we could see the river, the town, and the sea at the same time.
derivatives.translation: 山頂的景色非常令人印象深刻，因為我們可以同時看到河流、城鎮和大海。

click.eng_def: the act of pressing a button on a computer mouse to choose something on a screen; a short and light sound
click.example: Many popular songs are on the music app, and each one is just a click away. / I heard a click, and the door locked. / As soon as you click the "Play" button, the computer game will start. / Key in the correct password, and the safe will click open right away.
click.translation: 許多受歡迎的歌曲都在這個音樂應用程式上，每一首只要點擊一下就能聽到。 / 我聽到卡嗒一聲，門就鎖上了。 / 你一點擊「開始遊戲」的按鈕，電腦遊戲就會開始。 / 輸入正確的密碼，保險箱馬上就會卡嗒一聲打開。

consequence.eng_def: a result or an effect of something, often a bad one
consequence.example: Accidents often happen as a consequence of not paying attention to small details.
consequence.translation: 意外常常是因為不注意小細節所造成的結果。

derivatives.eng_def: happening as a result of a particular action or set of conditions
derivatives.example: Factories dumped waste into the river, and the consequent pollution killed many fish.
derivatives.translation: 工廠將廢水排入河中，隨之而來的污染毒死了許多魚。

satisfying.eng_def: making someone feel happy by giving something they want
satisfying.example: This vacation has been truly satisfying for all of us, and we couldn't ask for more.
satisfying.translation: 這次的假期對我們所有人來說真的很令人滿足，我們別無所求了。

derivatives.eng_def: to fulfill a need, desire, or expectation
derivatives.example: The six-bedroom house is large enough to satisfy the needs of a big family.
derivatives.translation: 這棟有六間臥室的房子夠大，能滿足一個大家庭的需求。

derivatives.eng_def: fulfilling expectations or needs; acceptable
derivatives.example: The room is small, but it's satisfactory for one person.
derivatives.translation: 這個房間很小，但對一個人來說已經足夠(合格)了。

information.example: You can find some information about this singer on her fan page, such as her birthday and her life stories.
information.translation: 你可以在她的粉絲專頁上找到關於這位歌手的資訊，例如她的生日和生平故事。

derivatives.eng_def: to give someone facts or information
derivatives.example: The hospital will inform patients of the results of their medical examination in a week.
derivatives.translation: 醫院會在一週內通知病人他們的體檢結果。

including.eng_def: used to mention that someone or something is part of a group or total
including.example: Jessica invited the whole class to her birthday party, including the classmates she didn't know well.
including.translation: Jessica 邀請全班參加她的生日派對，包括她不太熟的同學。

derivatives.eng_def: to contain as part of a whole
derivatives.example: The price of a package tour usually includes the cost of hotels, meals, and plane tickets.
derivatives.translation: 套裝行程的價格通常包括飯店、餐點和機票的費用。

search.eng_def: the act of looking carefully for someone or something
search.example: When spring comes, birds will fly around this area in search of a perfect place to build their nests. / After the huge earthquake, several trained dogs were sent to search the building for the missing people.
search.translation: 春天來臨時，鳥兒會在這個區域飛來飛去，尋找築巢的完美地點。 / 大地震發生後，幾隻訓練有素的狗被派去搜索這棟建築物，尋找失蹤者。

harmless.eng_def: not dangerous or not causing damage
harmless.example: Though some animals look cute and harmless, they can attack people when they are angry.
harmless.translation: 雖然有些動物看起來可愛又無害，但牠們生氣時也會攻擊人。

derivatives.eng_def: physical or mental damage or injury; to physically injure or cause damage to
derivatives.example: The mean words someone left on Rita's Instagram did harm to her mental health. / Looking at screens for long hours can harm your eyes if you don't take breaks.
derivatives.translation: 有人在 Rita 的 Instagram 上留下的刻薄言語對她的心理健康造成了傷害。 / 如果不休息，長時間看螢幕會傷害你的眼睛。

affect.eng_def: to cause a change in someone or something
affect.example: Bad weather and insect damage can both affect the quality of apples.
affect.translation: 惡劣的天氣和蟲害都會影響蘋果的品質。

content.eng_def: things presented on a website or in a book, speech, movie, etc.
content.example: The content of the book is about different cultures and customs around the world, and they're fun to read.
content.translation: 這本書的內容是關於世界各地不同的文化和習俗，讀起來很有趣。

derivatives.eng_def: the things that are inside a container
derivatives.example: Tony carefully checked the contents of the box again before he packed it.
derivatives.translation: Tony 在把箱子打包前，再次仔細檢查了裡面的內容物。

advertisement.eng_def: a picture, video, or message that tries to sell something or share information about something
advertisement.example: To increase the sales of the new car, the company placed advertisements on buses, trains, and shopping mall walls.
advertisement.translation: 為了增加新車的銷量，該公司在公車、火車和購物中心的牆壁上投放廣告。

derivatives.eng_def: to describe or draw attention to a product, service, or event in a public medium in order to promote sales or attendance
derivatives.example: Instead of advertising our products in newspapers or magazines, we choose social media platforms to reach a wider audience.
derivatives.translation: 我們不選擇在報紙或雜誌上為產品打廣告，而是選擇社交媒體平台以接觸更廣泛的受眾。

dislike.eng_def: something that someone does not like; to feel distaste for or hostility toward
dislike.chi_def: 討厭的事物；厭惡，不喜愛
dislike.example: Although Mark enjoys most sports, one of his few dislikes is swimming. / Helen dislikes doing housework, so she always tries to avoid it if possible.
dislike.translation: 雖然 Mark 喜歡大多數的運動，但他少數討厭的事物之一是游泳。 / Helen 討厭做家事，所以如果可能的話她總是盡量避免。

image.eng_def: the way that someone or something appears to people; a picture in a mirror or on a screen
image.example: The actor cared about his public image, and he chose his words carefully when he answered the reporters' questions. / In the past, TV images were only in black and white.
image.translation: 這位演員很在乎他的公眾形象，在回答記者問題時措辭非常謹慎。 / 在過去，電視畫面只有黑白的。

comment.eng_def: a statement that expresses an opinion; to express an opinion or reaction
comment.chi_def: 評論，意見；評論，表達意見
comment.example: In this online learning program, viewers can leave comments to share their thoughts with others. / My professor will comment on my report in the meeting and give me some new ideas to think about.
comment.translation: 在這個線上學習計畫中，觀看者可以留言評論，與他人分享他們的想法。 / 我的教授會在會議上評論我的報告，並給我一些新想法去思考。

form.eng_def: to begin to exist or develop; the visible shape or configuration of something
form.example: A long line quickly formed outside the store when the buy-one-get-one-free event began. / Using emojis is a common form of showing feelings in text messages.
form.translation: 買一送一活動開始時，店外很快就排起了長龍(形成了長長的隊伍)。 / 使用表情符號是簡訊中表達情感的一種常見形式。

opinion.eng_def: one's feelings or thoughts about someone or something
opinion.example: Since the team members had different views about the new project, the boss asked everyone to share their opinions about it.
opinion.translation: 由於團隊成員對新專案有不同的看法，老闆要求大家分享對此的意見。

offensive.eng_def: describing something that is likely to make someone feel upset
offensive.example: Many women said the song's lyrics are offensive to them and make them uncomfortable.
offensive.translation: 許多女性表示這首歌的歌詞冒犯了她們，讓她們感到不舒服。

derivatives.eng_def: to cause to feel resentment or indignation
derivatives.example: If you ask people too many personal questions about their age or family, you are likely to offend them.
derivatives.translation: 如果你問人們太多關於他們年齡或家庭的私人問題，你很可能會冒犯他們。

derivatives.eng_def: annoyance or resentment brought about by a perceived insult to or disregard for oneself or one's standards or principles
derivatives.example: Though some of the scenes in the movie may be humorous, they have caused offense to people of certain cultures.
derivatives.translation: 雖然電影中的某些場景可能很幽默，但它們已經對某些文化的人造成了冒犯。

applicant.eng_def: someone who formally asks for something
applicant.example: As an applicant for the training program, you need to provide your full name and ID number.
applicant.translation: 作為培訓計畫的申請人，您需要提供全名和身分證字號。

derivatives.eng_def: to make a formal application or request
derivatives.example: The company promises high salaries and good benefits, and thus thousands of people apply to it.
derivatives.translation: 這家公司承諾高薪和良好的福利，因此有成千上萬的人申請。

derivatives.eng_def: a formal request to an authority for something
derivatives.example: Kent's application for the manager's position was not accepted because he didn't have enough related experience.
derivatives.translation: Kent 對經理職位的申請沒有被接受，因為他沒有足夠的相關經驗。

offer.eng_def: something that someone gives or makes available to someone else; to present or proffer (something) for (someone) to accept or reject as so desired
offer.example: After applying to several colleges, Tina was excited to receive an admission offer from her top choice. / The restaurant owner offers free meals to homeless people once a year.
offer.translation: 在申請了幾所大學後，Tina 很高興收到了她首選大學的錄取通知(機會)。 / 這位餐廳老闆每年向無家可歸的人提供一次免費餐點。

damage.eng_def: to harm something; physical harm caused to something in such a way as to impair its value, usefulness, or normal function
damage.example: Luckily, the driver wasn't hurt in the accident, even though his car was badly damaged. / You should turn the volume down. Loud music can cause damage to your hearing.
damage.translation: 幸運的是，即使司機的車被嚴重損壞，他在事故中也沒有受傷。 / 你應該把音量調低。大聲的音樂會對你的聽力造成損害。

identity.example: Many people choose to use fake names online instead of showing their true identities.
identity.translation: 許多人選擇在網路上使用假名，而不是顯示他們的真實身分。

annual.example: The annual report shows that this company earned over ten million dollars last year.
annual.translation: 這份年度報告顯示，該公司去年賺了超過一千萬美元。

pain.example: Oliver experienced terrible back pain because of his poor sitting position.
pain.translation: 因為坐姿不良，Oliver 經歷了嚴重的背痛。

remind.eng_def: to make someone think about something again
remind.example: This song means a lot to the couple because it always reminds them of the day they first met.
remind.translation: 這首歌對這對情侶意義重大，因為它總讓他們想起初次見面的那一天。

dependence.eng_def: the situation of needing someone or something for help, support, etc.
dependence.example: The Pacific island country has tried to reduce its dependence on other nations for food.
dependence.translation: 這個太平洋島國已試圖減少在糧食上對其他國家的依賴。

derivatives.eng_def: to trust someone or something and know that they will help you or do what you want or expect
derivatives.example: Our success depends on the support and help from many other people.
derivatives.translation: 我們的成功取決於許多其他人的支持與幫助。

celebrate.eng_def: to do something special or enjoyable for an important event or holiday
celebrate.example: The basketball team hugged each other to celebrate their victory in the final game.
celebrate.translation: 籃球隊員互相擁抱，慶祝他們在決賽中的勝利。

derivatives.eng_def: a special social event, such as a party, when you celebrate something
derivatives.example: Julie has planned a birthday celebration for her son. She will invite all of her son's classmates over to their house to give him a surprise.
derivatives.translation: Julie 為兒子策劃了一場生日慶祝活動。她將邀請兒子所有的同學到家裡給他一個驚喜。

accomplishment.eng_def: the successful completion of something / something difficult that is done with a lot of effort over a period of time
accomplishment.example: Emma felt a great sense of accomplishment after she finished her first marathon. / It was a great accomplishment for the tennis player to win the championship after his injury.
accomplishment.translation: Emma 完成了她的第一場馬拉松後，感到巨大的成就感。 / 受傷後贏得冠軍，對這位網球選手來說是一項偉大的成就。

derivatives.eng_def: to finish something successfully or to achieve something
derivatives.example: Simon and Liam must work together to accomplish this task in a limited amount of time.
derivatives.translation: Simon 和 Liam 必須合作，在有限的時間內完成這項任務。

duty.example: In Australia, those who do not vote in elections will be fined because they fail to do their duty.
duty.translation: 在澳洲，未在選舉中投票的人將面臨罰款，因為他們未能履行自己的義務。

strength.eng_def: the quality of being determined to deal with something difficult / the physical power
strength.example: Encouragement from the teacher helped Madison find the strength to study harder after she got a bad grade. / Louis did not have enough strength to carry this heavy box, so he asked his sister to help him.
strength.translation: 老師的鼓勵幫助 Madison 找到了在成績不佳後更努力學習的力量。 / Louis 沒有足夠的力氣搬動這個重箱子，所以他請姐姐幫忙。

derivatives.eng_def: to make something stronger or more effective
derivatives.example: The two neighboring countries signed an agreement to strengthen their relationship.
derivatives.translation: 這兩個鄰國簽署了一項協議以加強彼此的關係。

traditional.eng_def: following ways of living or thinking that have existed for a long time
traditional.example: Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade is one of the most famous traditional holiday events in the United States.
traditional.translation: 梅西感恩節大遊行是美國最著名的傳統節日活動之一。

derivatives.eng_def: a belief, principle, or way of acting that people in a particular society or group have continued to follow for a long time
derivatives.example: Giving and receiving red envelopes is a well-known Lunar New Year tradition in Taiwan.
derivatives.translation: 收發紅包在台灣是眾所皆知的農曆新年傳統。

feature.eng_def: to include someone or something as an important part
feature.example: Today, numerous convenience stores feature a wide variety of food and excellent services.
feature.translation: 如今，許多便利商店以種類繁多的食物和優質的服務為主要特色。

derivatives.eng_def: a typical quality or an important part of something
derivatives.example: The most obvious feature of a giraffe is its long neck.
derivatives.translation: 長頸鹿最明顯的特徵就是牠的長脖子。

recent.example: This small town was introduced on a travel show, so it has become a popular attraction in recent months.
recent.translation: 這個小鎮在一個旅遊節目上被介紹，因此近幾個月來成為了一個受歡迎的景點。

community.eng_def: all the people who live in the same place or a group of people with the same interests, religion, race, etc.
community.example: Ms. Suzuki is a respected person in the Asian community because she takes care of many students who study abroad.
community.translation: 鈴木女士在亞洲社群中備受尊敬，因為她照顧許多出國留學的學生。

local.eng_def: relating to a certain area or place one lives in, or is talking about
local.example: Ms. Lee is a supporter of local farms. She always buys fresh vegetables that are grown in the town she lives in.
local.translation: 李女士是當地農場的支持者。她總是購買在她居住的小鎮種植的新鮮蔬菜。

derivatives.eng_def: a person who lives in the particular small area that you are talking about
derivatives.example: Nathan got lost when he was traveling in Chicago, so he asked one of the locals for directions.
derivatives.translation: Nathan 在芝加哥旅行時迷路了，所以他向一位當地人問路。

government.eng_def: the group of people who are officially responsible for running and managing a country, state, or city
government.example: In a democratic country, citizens have the right to elect their government.
government.translation: 在民主國家，公民有權選舉他們的政府。

derivatives.eng_def: to rule a country, state, or city, or to control the people living there
derivatives.example: The mayor has governed the city for four years and is now running for re-election.
derivatives.translation: 這位市長已治理該市四年，目前正在競選連任。

various.eng_def: many or several different types of something
various.example: Gary keeps himself busy with various activities, such as reading, drawing, and rock climbing.
various.translation: Gary 用各種活動讓自己保持忙碌，例如閱讀、畫畫和攀岩。

derivatives.eng_def: a different type of something, or the characteristic of often changing and being different
derivatives.example: This bakery has a wide variety of items. You can find over forty different kinds of bread and cakes.
derivatives.translation: 這家麵包店有種類繁多的商品。你可以找到超過四十種不同的麵包和蛋糕。

serve.eng_def: to give someone food or drink at a meal
serve.example: Guests at this hotel will be served with delicious Middle Eastern breakfasts during their stay.
serve.translation: 這家飯店的客人在入住期間將獲供應美味的中東早餐。

besides.example: That movie seems boring. Besides, the reviews are terrible.
besides.translation: 那部電影看起來很無聊。而且，影評也很糟。

derivatives.eng_def: in addition to; also
derivatives.example: Besides beef noodles, Jenny introduced the foreign tourist to many Taiwanese foods, such as braised pork rice and stinky tofu.
derivatives.translation: 除了牛肉麵，Jenny 還向外國遊客介紹了許多台灣美食，像是滷肉飯和臭豆腐。

culture.eng_def: a set of ideas and ways of doing things shared by a group of people
culture.example: In some European cultures, friends may greet one another with a hug or a kiss on the cheek.
culture.translation: 在一些歐洲文化中，朋友們可能會以擁抱或親吻臉頰來互相打招呼。

derivatives.eng_def: relating to the habits, traditions, and beliefs of a society
derivatives.example: Cultural differences sometimes cause misunderstandings between people from different countries.
derivatives.translation: 文化差異有時會造成來自不同國家的人們之間的誤解。

tourism.eng_def: the business of providing services for travelers
tourism.example: The government announced a visa-free policy for travelers from various countries in order to promote tourism.
tourism.translation: 為了促進觀光，政府宣布對來自多個國家的旅客實施免簽證政策。

derivatives.eng_def: a visit to a place or area, especially one during which you look around the place or area and learn about it
derivatives.example: The geography teacher asked her students to design a walking tour which takes travelers to at least three temples in this city.
derivatives.translation: 地理老師要求她的學生設計一個徒步導覽，帶領旅客參觀這個城市裡的至少三座寺廟。

express.eng_def: to show a feeling or idea by words or looks
express.example: In the debate class, each student has three minutes to express their views on stage.
express.translation: 在辯論課上，每位學生有三分鐘的時間在台上表達他們的觀點。

derivatives.eng_def: a look on someone's face that conveys a particular emotion
derivatives.example: Steve did not say a word after he heard the news, but his surprised expression said it all.
derivatives.translation: Steve 聽到這個消息後一句話也沒說，但他驚訝的表情說明了一切。

grateful.example: The singer is grateful for the support of her fans.
grateful.translation: 這位歌手很感激粉絲們的支持。

creative.eng_def: showing original ideas, or being able to use unusual ideas to make new things or works of art
creative.example: Peter is good at thinking of creative ways to reuse old items, such as turning a plastic bottle into a pencil case.
creative.translation: Peter很擅長想出有創意的辦法來重複使用舊物，例如把塑膠瓶變成鉛筆盒。

derivatives.eng_def: to make something new, or invent something
derivatives.example: A tech company is building a new factory in the area, which will create more local jobs and support the community.
derivatives.translation: 一家科技公司正在該地區建立新工廠，這將創造更多當地就業機會並支持社區。

derivatives.eng_def: the act of creating something, or the thing that is created
derivatives.example: The creation of chat apps made it easier for people to stay in touch when they couldn't meet face to face.
derivatives.translation: 聊天應用程式的創立讓人們在無法面對面見面時更容易保持聯繫。

derivatives.eng_def: the ability to produce or use original and unusual ideas
derivatives.example: Creativity helps people find new ways to solve problems in daily life.
derivatives.translation: 創造力幫助人們找到解決日常生活中問題的新方法。

signal.eng_def: a piece of equipment with colored lights on a road or railway that tells road users to stop, go, or slow down; an action, movement, or sound that gives someone information or tells them what to do; to make a movement, sound, flash, etc. that gives information or tells people what to do
signal.chi_def: 號誌燈；信號；發信號,示意
signal.example: Drivers must stop when the traffic signals on the road turn red. / When the volleyball coach gave the signal, the players changed their strategy and focused on the attack. / Becky had trouble figuring out the menu, so she signaled to the waiter for help.
signal.translation: 當路上的交通號誌變紅時，駕駛必須停車。 / 當排球教練發出信號時，球員們改變了策略並專注於進攻。 / Becky 看不懂菜單，所以她向服務生示意尋求幫助。

pressured.eng_def: feeling worried or stressed because you have too many tasks or too much to deal with
pressured.example: Many students feel pressured before exams because they have to review several subjects at the same time.
pressured.translation: 許多學生在考試前會感到壓力，因為他們必須同時複習好幾個科目。

derivatives.eng_def: to strongly persuade someone to do something they do not want to do
derivatives.example: We said no several times, but the salesperson still tried to pressure us into buying the more expensive model.
derivatives.translation: 我們拒絕了好幾次，但業務員仍然試圖強迫我們購買較昂貴的型號。

derivatives.eng_def: a difficult situation that makes you feel worried or unhappy
derivatives.example: The small country was under pressure to sign the deal, even though doing so would clearly harm its own interests.
derivatives.translation: 這個小國在壓力下簽署了協議，即使這樣做顯然會損害其自身利益。

figure.eng_def: a person or an animal in a drawing, painting, or story; a number that shows an amount
figure.chi_def: 人物形象,人物；數字,數據
figure.example: The painting shows a lonely figure who is walking through the snow. / According to trade figures, Taiwan exports a large amount of fruit to other countries every year.
figure.translation: 這幅畫展現了一個在雪地中行走的孤獨人物。 / 根據貿易數據，台灣每年向其他國家出口大量的水果。

manage.eng_def: to control the movements or actions of something; to succeed in doing or dealing with something difficult
manage.chi_def: 調節,控制；成功解決(問題、困難等)
manage.example: This dam was built to manage the flow of water during the rainy season. / The team managed to finish the group project on time, even though they thought they couldn't make it.
manage.translation: 這座水壩是為了在雨季調節水流而建造的。 / 這個團隊成功地準時完成了小組報告，即使他們本以為做不到。

derivatives.eng_def: the control and organization of something
derivatives.example: Good time management is important for students who have a lot on their plate each day.
derivatives.translation: 良好的時間管理對於每天有很多事情要做的學生來說很重要。

reflect.eng_def: to show or be a sign of a situation, feeling, or what a person is like; to show an image of someone or something on the surface of a mirror, glass, or water
reflect.example: The polite tone of the email reflects the applicant's respect for the school. / In Greek myths, a young man called Narcissus fell in love with himself when he saw his own face reflected in the water.
reflect.translation: 電子郵件禮貌的語氣反映了申請人對學校的尊重。 / 在希臘神話中，一個名叫納西瑟斯的年輕人看到自己在水中的倒影時，愛上了自己。

derivatives.eng_def: the image of something in a mirror or on any reflective surface
derivatives.example: The dancer checked her reflection in the mirror before she went on stage.
derivatives.translation: 舞者在上台前照鏡子檢查了自己的倒影。

design.eng_def: the way the parts and appearance of something are planned and arranged; to make or draw plans for something
design.example: The design of the jeans was once fashionable, but it's not popular anymore. / The engineers designed a new online pre-order app to allow customers to order meals before they arrive at the restaurant.
design.translation: 這款牛仔褲的設計曾經很流行，但現在不再受歡迎了。 / 工程師設計了一款新的線上預購應用程式，讓顧客能在抵達餐廳前點餐。
